levelCostFormula.formulaNote: Iterative: cost(1→2) = baseCost = 10. Each subsequent level: cost = round((prevCost + baseCost) * (1 + 0.065 * heroLevelCostFactor)). heroLevelCostFactor = (1 - ticketHeroLevelCost*0.005) * (1 - runeHeroLevelCost*0.005) * (1 - ultimusHeroLevelCostReduction*0.005) * (1 - masteryHeroLevelCost*0.005). Default heroLevelCostFactor = 1.0 (no upgrades), giving multiplier 1.065 per level. Cumulative 1→10: 715, 1→25: 5566, 1→100: 1,439,759 (at default factor).

masteryExpFormula.formulaNote: exp(L) = baseAmount * 24 * L * mult. Multipliers (cumulative): x1.1 at L>=6, x1.1 at L>=9 (x1.21 total), x1.2 at L>=11 (x1.452 total). maxLevel=10 per hero. After maxing, L is set to 11 and repeats indefinitely.
